title: Wilckia × hybrida
intro: Wilckia × hybrida, commonly known as Wilckia, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the family Sapindaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties that may help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. Wilckia × hybrida contains bioactive constituents such as lignans, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Wilckia include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to support mental health and well-being, and to promote a restful night's sleep.
